title: RNA Secondary Structure data (raw, predictions, and structural motif analysis)
author: Whiting, Erik
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This dataset is meant to be used alongside RNAFoldAssess, a benchmarking tool for RNA secondary structure prediction models. The data contains raw inputs that can be transformed into DataPoint objects, as well as outputs from using the entire pipeline of the package.
steps_raw: This dataset is meant to be used alongside RNAFoldAssess, a benchmarking tool for RNA secondary structure prediction models. The data contains raw inputs that can be transformed into DataPoint objects, as well as outputs from using the entire pipeline of the package.
